a:T1526,<div class="question">
<p>A capacitor is charged with a constant current <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mi>I</mi></math>. The graph shows the variation of potential difference <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mi>V</mi></math> across the capacitor with time <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mi>t</mi></math>. The gradient of the graph is <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mi>G</mi></math>. What is the capacitance of the capacitor?</p>
<p style="text-align:center;"> <img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p>A.  <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mfrac><mi>I</mi><mi>G</mi></mfrac></math></p>
<p>B.  <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mfrac><mi>G</mi><mi>I</mi></mfrac></math></p>
<p>C.  <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mi>G</mi><mo>×</mo><mi>I</mi></math></p>
<p>D.  <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mfrac><mn>1</mn><mrow><mi>G</mi><mo>×</mo><mi>I</mi></mrow></mfrac></math></p>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/physics/topic/11/","children":["← back to ","Physics"," topic ","11"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"21M.1.HL.TZ2.36"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Physics"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"HL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","1"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"21M"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","11-3-capacitance"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>A</p>\n</div>"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n[N/A]\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
